search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com domain as requested. Focused on concrete English guide pages tied to heroes and research.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero index and equipment page with character roster, faction filters, levels, and gear stats; good for hero discovery and cross-checking hero-related pages.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and equipment details.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category navigation and badge costs by level; useful for locating research topics and checking cost structures.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories, names, and badge costs per level.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English homepage linking to hero, research, alliance, and strategy content; useful as an entry point but less specific than dedicated pages.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to www.last-z.wiki per instructions. No matching pages were returned for the query, so no discovery leads could be produced.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results matched the query on the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search limited to the approved domain. No matching pages were found for the query within the allowed source domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results found on lastz-command-center-one.vercel.app for the supplied query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastz.fandom.com only. Results prioritize pages directly connected to research, hero upgrades, and event cycles. No public-claim-ready conclusions were made.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily rotating event with an Age of Science theme for research speed-ups and a Hero Initiative theme for hero upgrades.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event cycles reward research and hero spending.
claims_to_verify: Exact schedule by day and time
Point sources for research and hero tasks

results.title: Bookstore | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Bonus building tied to faster research; useful for cross-checking research-speed mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Verify buildings that affect research speed.

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core research building for technologies, with unlock and upgrade details plus a second lab later in progression.
results.primary_user_job: Verify how technology research is unlocked and upgraded.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no indexed matches for the requested Last Z gear guide query. Could not identify discovery leads within the approved domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on www.packsify.com for the requested query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com only. Returned several Last Z-specific guide pages with concrete mechanics and progression data. Generic or off-topic pages were not included.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for long-range troop training; covers unlocks, upgrade table, training cap, speed, and power.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades for troop training efficiency.
claims_to_verify: Promotion behavior for higher-level Shooter Camp

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for assault troop training; covers training speed, cap, and power milestones.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades to improve troop training output.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for research progression; covers technologies, HQ dependency, and second lab unlock.
results.primary_user_job: Decide research priorities and when to unlock extra lab capacity.
